title: Puppy — easy start
summary: Start with very short sessions and simple rewards.
warnings: Do not punish the dog for not understanding.

title: Puppy — 7 day plan
summary: Short sessions, repetition and calm rewards.
dontDo: do not train when tired or stressed

title: Adult dog — normal plan
summary: Adult dogs can work longer, but short sessions are still better.
warnings: Do not increase difficulty too fast.

title: Adult dog — 7 day plan
summary: Build basic commands and move them into daily situations.
dontDo: do not train in too hard environment

title: High energy — 7 day plan
summary: Combine calm exercises, scent work and short tasks.
steps: Day 1: scent mat or scattered treats.
dontDo: do not start with hard commands

title: Senior dog — calm training
summary: For older dogs, keep training light and comfortable.
warnings: Consult a vet if pain or sudden behavior change appears.

title: Senior dog — 7 day plan
summary: A calm, short and comfort-first plan.

title: Harder goal — be careful
summary: Break the goal into smaller steps.
warnings: Aggression, fear or sudden changes require a specialist.

title: Harder goal — 7 day plan
summary: This is not for serious behavioral problems, but helps structure mild exercises.
steps: Day 3: train in a calm place.
dontDo: do not work alone with aggression

title: Training plan — start
summary: Begin with one short calm session and one simple command.
steps: Train briefly and finish with success.
warnings: The app does not replace a behaviorist or veterinarian.

title: Training plan — 7 days
summary: Universal plan for simple home exercises.
dontDo: do not train when the dog is ill or stressed
